item.title: OneNotch 1.2.0 (7)
item.description:
A major clipboard upgrade built for fast, focused workflows.

  • Select multiple clipboard items and paste them as an ordered queue.
  • Use Copy Stack to collect items while you work, then paste them one by one with a global shortcut.
  • Run OneNotch as a focused clipboard manager from the menu bar without the notch interface.
  • Jump back to the original web page for content copied from supported browsers.
  • Pause clipboard capture anytime and keep up to 200 items in history.
  • Improved copy feedback, loading states, hover visuals, and usage details.

item.title: OneNotch 0.1.2 (6)
item.description:
A smoother, more flexible clipboard experience.

  • See clearer labels and previews for files, images, and SVG clipboard items.
  • Recognize six-character hexadecimal colors without a leading # using the new clipboard setting.
  • Optionally hide the closed notch while idle and reveal it again on hover or activity.
  • Improved clipboard dragging and floating panel presentation.
  • Updated usage details, translations, and interface polish.

item.title: OneNotch 0.1.1 (5)
item.description:
Faster clipboard workflows directly from the notch.

  • Navigate items with the Left, Right, Up, and Down arrow keys.
  • Jump to items with Command+1, Command+2, and additional number shortcuts.
  • See rich image previews for copied website links.
  • Sort clipboard items and delete them directly from the notch.
  • Signed with Developer ID and notarized by Apple.

item.title: OneNotch 0.1.0 (4)
item.description:
OneNotch beta update.

  • Improved and expanded the onboarding experience.
  • Updated onboarding translations.
  • Signed with Developer ID and notarized by Apple.
